items.title: Public Safety and Security Market Set for Strong Growth to USD 1472.56 Billion by 2033, Driven by Smart City Investments and Advanced Surveillance Adoption | SNS Insider
items.author: Sns Insider
items.description: The global public safety and security market is projected to grow from USD 569.86 billion in 2025 to USD 1472.56 billion by 2033, with a CAGR of 12.60%. Growth is driven by smart city investments, AI/IoT adoption, rising security threats, and increased urbanization. Professional services dominate with 61% revenue share, while managed services and emergency management segments show fastest growth. North America leads with 38% market share, with Asia Pacific expected to grow fastest at 15.53% CAGR.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Cisco is highlighted as a key player with relevant solutions (Cisco Meraki, Cisco Firepower) and recent positive development with 'AI Defense' solution released in 2025, addressing enterprise security and AI workload protection in a growing market.

Motorola Solutions is listed as a major player and specifically mentioned for recent innovation in 2025 with 'Inform' platform that merges video, access control, and sensor data for AI-assisted incident response, directly addressing market growth drivers.
Honeywell is identified as a key player with relevant security solutions (Galaxy Flex, Pro-Watch) in a market experiencing strong 12.60% CAGR growth driven by increasing security demands.
IBM is listed as a key player offering cybersecurity solutions (QRadar, Resilient) in the expanding public safety and security market with strong growth projections.
Siemens is identified as a key player with surveillance and control center solutions (Siveillance, Desigo CC) positioned to benefit from market expansion.
Ericsson is listed as a key player with public safety and mobility management solutions in a market experiencing strong growth driven by urbanization and security concerns.
General Dynamics is listed as a key player with mission systems and security solutions in a market with strong 12.60% CAGR growth.
L3 Harris is identified as a key player offering P25 radios and public safety communications solutions in a growing market driven by critical infrastructure security needs.
BAE Systems is listed as a key player with security solutions (NetReveal) positioned to benefit from market expansion.
NEC is listed as a key player offering biometric and intelligent video analytics solutions (NeoFace) in a market with strong growth driven by advanced surveillance adoption.
Thales is identified as a key player with video surveillance solutions positioned to benefit from the market's projected growth to USD 1.47 trillion by 2033.
